testcase.name: SC-01-T02 В· P02вҶ’P03 и·іиҪ¬ В· createPending + analyze-by-url + SSE и®ўйҳ… вҖә AC1-3 В· happy path В· P02 upload вҶ’ createPending 201 вҶ’ analyze 202 вҶ’ jump P03 вҶ’ SSE 4жӯҘ вҶ’ P04
SC-01-T02 В· P02вҶ’P03 и·іиҪ¬ В· createPending + analyze-by-url + SSE и®ўйҳ… вҖә AC4 В· createPending 5xx вҶ’ ERROR banner + stays P02 + no P03
SC-01-T02 В· P02вҶ’P03 и·іиҪ¬ В· createPending + analyze-by-url + SSE и®ўйҳ… вҖә AC5 В· analyze-by-url 5xx вҶ’ ERROR banner + stays P02 + no P03
SC-01-T02 В· P02вҶ’P03 и·іиҪ¬ В· createPending + analyze-by-url + SSE и®ўйҳ… вҖә AC6 В· SSE connection failure вҶ’ P03 entered + fallback banner
SC-01-T02 В· P02вҶ’P03 и·іиҪ¬ В· createPending + analyze-by-url + SSE и®ўйҳ… вҖә TI1 В· createPending carries X-Idempotency-Key header (reuse semantics)
SC-01-T02 В· P02вҶ’P03 и·іиҪ¬ В· createPending + analyze-by-url + SSE и®ўйҳ… вҖә TI2 В· analyze-by-url request body contains task_id + subject + image_url
